_meta.description: Real RuntimeHealthData output from buildOpenCodeHealthReport() + runtimeHealth(). Generated by invoking the engine and adapter modules directly with no harness startup, no filesystem access, and no credentials.
_meta.notes: hostname and pid fields from pino log output are excluded. No credentials, API keys, or sensitive local paths are present.

capabilities.notes: OpenCode adapter reads config via @weave/config discovery
Plugin registers Loom as the primary agent via OpenCode SDK
spawnSubagent materializes specialist agents on demand
Engine template renderer handles all prompt composition
RuntimeStore (InMemory or SQLite) persists execution state
runWorkflowLifecycle drives step dispatch through the engine
OpenCode slash commands (/weave:start, /weave:run) are the explicit delivery path
All adapter modules use the shared pino logger from @weave/engine
OpenCode SDK does not expose per-session token usage in this version

interpretation.summary: The OpenCode adapter is ready (profileResult.ready=true). All required capabilities are native or emulated. command-entrypoints is emulated — slash commands are the explicit delivery path. 8 optional capabilities are missing or unsupported (warnings only, not failures). No required capabilities are absent or failed.
interpretation.commandEntrypointsReadiness: emulated — /weave:start and /weave:run are the explicit delivery path; native TUI slash registration is not yet wired for /weave:abort and /weave:advance (see DEGRADED_AFFORDANCES)
degradedAffordances: /weave:abort — native TUI abort button not yet wired to abortExecution
/weave:advance — native TUI step-advance UI not yet wired to advanceStep
